nodes.name: Trigger: Manual
nodes.notes:
Pick scenes_state=REQUESTED job, generate scenes+image-concepts in parallel.

Patch summary:
- Preferred turns_json as primary dialogue source; falls back to narration_script
- Added optional beats_json as canonical beat context for scene planning
- Added optional hook_line, title_moment, visual_moment_tags_json to prompt context
- Tightened config validation to actual prompt/canon/API dependencies
- Preserved legacy narration fallback and existing output schema

nodes.name: n8n Table: Get All Jobs
nodes.notes: No eligible job in the required state

nodes.name: Code: Pick & Lock Job
nodes.notes: Prefers turns_json as primary dialogue source (falls back to narration_script). Uses beats_json as canonical beat context when available (falls back to derived scene plan). Passes hook_line, title_moment, and visual_moment_tags_summary downstream for prompt enrichment.

nodes.name: Code: Build Images Prompt
nodes.notes: Uses normalized dialogue plus the shared beat-based scene plan so image concepts stay aligned with conversational shorts pacing.

nodes.name: Merge Branches
nodes.notes: Waits for both Drive uploads before Code: Merge Results runs.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Set Scenes READY
nodes.notes: Stores beat-aware scenes_json, keeps images_json, and unlocks the job for downstream dialogue-first rendering.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Load Env Vars
nodes.notes: Loads all rows from EnvironmentVariables table.

nodes.name: Code: Build Config
nodes.notes:
Builds flat Name→Value map from EnvironmentVariables rows.
Access values as: $('Code: Build Config').first().json.KeyName
